## What

<!-- 1-3 sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Affected areas

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Domain models
- [ ] Adapters (CKAN / data.gouv / Socrata / custom)
- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Transport (HTTP / retry / rate-limit)
- [ ] Discovery
- [ ] IO (download / cache / checksums / storage)
- [ ] Formats (CSV / JSON / XLSX / Parquet / GeoJSON)
- [ ] Integrations (pandas / Polars / dlt / Airflow / DuckDB)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Config
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Addresses exactly one issue or feature
- [ ] New or changed behavior has test coverage
- [ ] Diff contains only changes for this task
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files` passes (format, lint, type check, tests)
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under `## [Unreleased]`
